name: Collagen Night Wrapping Mask
fullName: Medicube Collagen Night Wrapping Mask
whyItFits: A mask that supports hydration, supports the skin barrier, helps improve glow and tone for dehydrated, dry, oily skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
Experience an overnight transformation with Medicube's Collagen Night Wrapping Mask, meticulously crafted to care for and protect your skin's elasticity while you sleep. This innovative peel-off facial mask is designed to work its magic overnight, providing intensive care for both elasticity and hydration.

Featuring a collagen wrapping film, this mask offers 8 hours of triple care, ensuring elasticity, hydration, and a radiant glow throughout the night. Unlike other peel-off masks, this formulation effortlessly removes in one piece, leaving your face feeling refreshed and revitalized.

Formulated with a potent fusion of key ingredients and advanced skincare technology, this Korean skincare gem can provide visibily firmer, smoother and more radiant-looking skin. Simply incorporate this easy-to-use mask into your nightly routine for visibily firmer and more radiant-looking skin.

* Hyaluronic Acid (Sodium Hyaluronate)
Intense hydration plumps the skin and provides fine line care.
* Niacinamide (Vitamin B3)
Improves skin texture, minimizes pore visibility, cares for the appearance of fine lines. Helps brighten the skin tone, giving it a radiant glow.
* Glycerin
Hydration, maintains skin barrier, prevents dryness.
* Tocopherol (Vitamin E)
Antioxidant protection, moisturizes, improves skin texture.
* Ceramide Np
Vital for maintaining the skin barrier function, preventing moisture loss, and protecting against environmental damage. Particularly effective at hydrating and caring for dry, damaged skin.
* Collagen Extract
Improves elasticity and hydration, provides line care, and helps promote a youthful-looking complexion.
* Adenosine
Help reduce the appearance of fine lines by skin renewal
* Butylene Glycol
Conditioning agent, humectant, maintains moisture, enhances absorption of other ingredients.
Ingredients
Water, Polyvinyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Agave Americana Stem Extract, Niacinamide, Sodium Hyaluronate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Caprylyl Glycol, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Chlorella Vulgaris Extract, Glucose, Butylene Glycol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Fructooligosaccharides, Fructose, Adenosine, Xanthan Gum, Cynanchum Atratum Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Althaea Rosea Flower Extract, Ceramide NP, Tocopherol, Pancratium Maritimum Extract, Collagen Extract, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate

name: Kojic Acid Turmeric Brightening Gel Mask - Single
fullName: Medicube Kojic Acid Turmeric Brightening Gel Mask - Single
whyItFits: A mask that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin, helps improve glow and tone for dry, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Use at night after toner; buffer with moisturizer if sensitive.
descriptionRaw:
A brightening gel mask powered by Kojic Acid and Turmeric to visibly improve uneven skin tone and dullness. This Medicube Kojic Acid Turmeric Gel Mask delivers soothing hydration while calming and revitalizing tired skin, leaving your complexion fresh, glowing, and more even-toned.

How To Use
Tip 1: Overnight Apply the mask at the end of your skincare routine and leave it on overnight. Remove the mask at night to wake up with glass glow skin.
Tip 2: Daytime After applying toner or cream, apply the mask and leave it on for 3-4 hours or until it becomes transparent.
Additional Tip (Tip 3: Recommended Use) Don't waste the eye and mouth parts of the mask. Apply it more intensively to areas that need extra hydration and elasticity, like the sides of your nose, around your eyes, and your neck.
For external use only. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Keep out of reach of children. *Read instructions and caution before use.

Ingredients
Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Acrylates/Ethylhexyl Acrylate Copolymer, Niacinamide, Chondrus Crispus Powder, 1,2-Hexanediol, Betaine, Ceratonia Siliqua (Carob) Gum, Hydroxyacetophenone, Allantoin, Glucomannan, Xanthan Gum, Laureth-21, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Propanediol, Cellulose Gum, Cyamopsis Tetragonoloba (Guar) Gum, Fragrance(Parfum), Potassium Chloride, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract, Lactobacillus Ferment, Melia Azadirachta Flower Extract, Dextrin, Ocimum Sanctum Leaf Extract, Adenosine, Ethylhexylglycerin, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Butylene Glycol, Corallina Officinalis Extract, Ascorbic Acid, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Kojic Acid, Tocopherol, Linoleic Acid, Ceramide NP, Retinol.

Clinically tested improvement in 2 weeks for a clearer, radiant look.

Use it as the first step of the skincare.

name: One Day Exosome Shot 2000
fullName: Medicube One Day Exosome Shot 2000
whyItFits: A spot-treatment that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin, supports the skin barrier for dry, oily skin.
layeringNotes: Use mainly at night; avoid stacking with other exfoliants on the same night.
descriptionRaw:
Drawing upon the principles of microneedling, we've crafted a micro-sized, needle-shaped booster to target a range of skin issues. Enhanced with 15M patented Exosome shots, this formula physically delivers active ingredients to pores, providing daily intensive treatments for home use. Clinically validated to care for pore size, smooth skin texture, strengthen the skin barrier, and promote a radiant complexion.


* Exosome-coated Spicule (Hydrolyzed sponge)
Taking the form of needles, spicules penetrate the epidermal layer of the skin, providing next generation care for pores and overall healthier skin. While various skincare products feature Spicules, none are quite like Exosome Shot, which contains Exosome-coated Spicules.
* Lacto Exosome
A patented active ingredient in Medicube, effectively cares for damaged skin, providing vitality and energy Comprised of various active ingredients including peptides, amino acids, glutathione, and vitamins, Medicube's patented Exosome addresses daily skin concerns and promotes natural skin health.
* AHA + BHA + PHA
Powerhouse ingredients that aid in resurfacing textured skin, dissolving dead skin cells, and promoting skin renewal.
* Niacinamide
Boosts the skin’s barrier and delivers hydration.
* Panthenol
Soothes the skin and helps improve hydration levels.

Ingredients
Water, Dipropylene Glycol, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Niacinamide, Sodium Polyacrylate, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, C12-14 Alketh-12, Hydrogenated Polydecene, Hydrolyzed Sponge, Ethylhexylglycerin, Adenosine, Caprylyl/Capryl Glucoside, Disodium EDTA, Panthenol, Lactobacillus Extracellular Vesicles, Campsis Grandiflora Flower Extract, Pueraria Lobata Root Extract, Pinus Palustris Leaf Extract, Oenothera Biennis (Evening Primrose) Flower Extract, Ulmus Davidiana Root Extract, Calcium Silicate, Sodium Silicate, Betaine Salicylate, Citric Acid, Gluconolactone

name: PDRN Pink Collagen Exosome Shot 2000
fullName: Medicube PDRN Pink Collagen Exosome Shot 2000
whyItFits: A serum that supports hydration, helps improve glow and tone, helps with visible pores for dehydrated, dry, oily skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
Editor's Note

Anti-aging serum contains 2000ppm of exosomes, salmon PDRN and collagen to promote skin cell regeneration, improve skin elasticity and tighten enlarged pores. Eight types of hyaluronic acid and niacinamide in the formula deliver hydrating and brightening effects. Clinically tested to be suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin.


Benefits:A serum containing 2000PPM exosomes improves skin tone and glow with only one use.

High purity of Sodium DNA helps erase the deep marks on the skin, and Exosome fills up the loose pores and creates glow skin.

Naturally pink hue derived from the serum's original ingredients without artificial coloring.

Hypoallergenic tested for the sensitive skin.


How to use:

name: PDRN Pink Collagen Mask - single
fullName: Medicube PDRN Pink Collagen Mask - single
whyItFits: A mask that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin, supports the skin barrier for dry, oily, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
Unlock glowing, youthful skin with the innovative color changing PDRN Pink Collagen Gel Mask!
This revolutionary salmon PDRN gel mask is packed with powerful ingredients that enhance skin elasticity and provide a luminous glow.

Advanced Formulation: Enriched with salmon PDRN and low-molecular collagen, this mask promotes a healthy complexion and balanced skin tone.
Low-Irritating Skin Barrier Care: It strengthens the skin barrier, targeting enlarged pores and uneven skin tone. Dermatologically tested and free from artificial colors.
Color-Changing Gel: The jelly mask transforms from pink to transparent, indicating optimal absorption.
Enhance Elasticity & Hydration: It soothes and hydrates the skin, helping you achieve the Korean glass glow.

* Salmon PDRN
Enhances elasticity and helps restore the skin's natural barrier function, improving the appearance of pores and evening out skin tone.
* Hydrolyzed Collagen
Boosts collagen, firms the skin, and reduces the appearance of fine lines.
* Niacinamide
Brightens skin tone, reduces the look of irritated skin, and strengthens the skin barrier.
* Peptide
Smooths fine lines and supports healthy skin structure.
Ingredients
Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Acrylates/Ethylhexyl Acrylate Copolymer, Niacinamide, Chondrus Crispus Powder, 1,2- Hexanediol, Butylene Glycol, Betaine, Ceratonia Siliqua (Carob) Gum, Hydroxyacetophenone, Allantoin, Glucomannan, Xanthan Gum, Laureth-21, Panthenol, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Propanediol, Cellulose Gum, Cyamopsis Tetragonoloba (Guar) Gum, Fragrance(Parfum), Potassium Chloride, Dextrin, Adenosine, Ethylhexylglycerin, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Cyanocobalamin, Ascorbic Acid, Sodium DNA, Tocopherol, Acetyl Hexapeptide-8, Ascorbic Acid Polypeptide, Acetyl Octapeptide-3, Acetyl Tetrapeptide-2, Acetyl Tetrapeptide-3, Acetyl Tetrapeptide-5, Acetyl Tetrapeptide-9, Carnosine, Copper Tripeptide-1, Nonapeptide-1, Palmitoyl Pentapeptide-4, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-5

name: Glass Skin Mask
fullName: Mixsoon Glass Skin Mask
whyItFits: A mask that supports hydration, helps improve glow and tone for dehydrated, dry skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
Restore radiance while firming skin with this peel-off mask packed with collagen. It’s also boosted with anti-aging ingredients like peptides and PDRN as well as hydrators like hyaluronic acid. Apply twice weekly to hit those glass skin goals.


Benefits:A peel-off mask that instantly moisturize and restore a radiant glass glow to skin.

Deeply hydrating formula that contains Low Molecular Weight Collagen, Hyaluronic Acid, Peptide, and PDRN for nourishment and elasticity care.

A gentle formula tested to be non irritating to skin.


How to use:

Apply an even layer to the entire face at the last step of skincare routine, avoiding eye and lip areas. Leave on for 30 minutes and gently peel off starting from the edges.


Ingredients

Water(Aqua), Glycerin, Dipropylene Glycol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Pullulan, Sodium Polystyrene Sulfonate, Algin, Polyglyceryl-2 Triisostearate, Polysorbate 80, Pectin, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Sucrose, Tromethamine, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Ethylhexylglycerin, Cellulose Gum, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Rosa Damascena Flower Water, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Butylene Glycol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Disodium Phosphate, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Polysorbate 60, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Squalane, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Centella Asiatica Extract, Sodium Phosphate, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Tocopherol, Cholesterol, Ceramide NP, Acetylphytosphingosine, Tripeptide-1, Phytosphingosine, Acetyl Hexapeptide-8, Alanine/Histidine/Lysine Polypeptide Copper HCl, Copper Tripeptide-1, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Palmitoyl Pentapeptide-4, Hexapeptide-11, Hexapeptide-9, Nonapeptide-1, Sodium DNA

name: Scalp & Hair Essence 50 ml
fullName: Mixsoon Scalp & Hair Essence 50 ml
whyItFits: A essence that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin, helps smooth uneven texture for dry, oily, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.
descriptionRaw:
Boost your favorite shampoos and conditioners with this nourishing hair essence formulated with anti-inflammatory herbal ingredients like sophora flavescens root, Chinese skullcap and goldthread extracts to restore health in scalp and tresses. The lightweight formula is additionally infused with white mulberry extract to keep irritation at bay. To use, mix with your shampoo or conditioner before massaging onto scalp and hair for optimal absorption.


Benefits:

Essence for your hair and scalp with 100% plant-based nourishing extracts.

Sophora Flavescens Root Extract, Scutellaria Baicalensis Root Extract, and Coptis Japonica Root Extract provides antibacterial, anti-inflammatory and soothing effects.

Morus Alba Bark Extract helps moisturize and calm scalp.

Lightweight texture that is easily absorbed by skin without leaving the scalp oily.


How to use:

Mix with shampoo or conditioner.

Apply an appropriate amount on areas of scalp as you want and gently massage to aid absorption.


Ingredients

Sophora Flavescens Root Extract, Scutellaria Baicalensis Root Extract, Coptis Japonica Root Extract, Morus Alba Bark Extract

name: Pamper Me Kit
fullName: Naisture Pamper Me Kit
whyItFits: A essence that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin for dry skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.
descriptionRaw:
Home Spa Kit With Frida

Inspired by Frida Kahlo's spirit of self-expression and empowerment, our 15 MIN Pamper Me Kit encourages you to embrace your individuality and prioritize self-care. Each sheet mask and body mask included in this home spa kit provides a nurturing escape for a brief yet yet indulgent spa session at home. Featuring a special Frida-themed gift, this kit is perfect for anyone looking to combine art with self-care! 

What's Inside:

  • Hair Mask: Revitalize and hydrate your hair
  • Hand Mask: Nourish and soften your hands
  • Foot Mask: Soothe and rejuvenate tired feet
  • 3 Facial Masks: Collagen, Tea Tree, and Hyaluronic Acid
  • Eye Mask: Refresh and depuff your eyes
  • Frida Kahlo Gift: One random Frida Kahlo-inspired free item 

How to use

  • After shampooing, gently squeeze the remaining water off of your hair.
  • Place hair mask and tighten it by using the tape which is attached on the hair mask cap.
  • Please continue your shower routine while your hair is being nourished.
  • Remove the hair mask after 15 minutes and rinse thoroughly with warm water.
  • Place an eye mask on clean skin.
  • Pick a facial mask of your choice and place it over the eye mask.
  • Apply foot and hand mask.
  • It’s time to relax for 15 minutes!
  • Enjoy your 15 minutes with your favorite scented candle and play list.
  • Remove the hand and foot mask, facial and eye mask.
  • Gently pat remaining essence to absorb. Continue with your skincare routine as needed.

Brighten skin and strengthen the skin barrier while protecting it against UV rays with the Mela-Pro Tranexamic Acid Sun Screen. It’s fitted with SPF 50+ PA++++ for sun protection. name: 5+ Vitamin Boosting Essential Toner
fullName: Numbuzin 5+ Vitamin Boosting Essential Toner
whyItFits: A essence that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin, targets blemish-prone skin for combination, dehydrated, dry skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.
descriptionRaw:
[FIRST-STEP COMPLEXION CARE] Essence-like toner enriched with glutathione and essential antioxidants for daily use, revitalizing dull skin and reducing dark spots. Use before the serum as skin booster, for gentle skin resurfacing or as hydrating essence in your routine to restore complexion.

[KEY INGREDIENTS] Formulated with tone-evening ingredients glutathione, vitamin C, and niacinamide to help gently yet effectively fade hyperpigmentation and darks spots and even out dull, uneven skin tone. Panthenol and madecassoside, to soothe and hydrate irritated, sensitive skin.

[CLINICALLY TESTED] Clinically proven to reduce dark spots by 18.12%. Effectiveness enhanced by 133% when used in combination with no.5+ serum. Skin irritation test completed, making it safe to use for sensitive and acne-prone skin types.

[KEY INGREDIENTS] Formulated with functional, skin-friendly ingredients including Niacinamide (50,000ppm), Vitamins C & E, Panthenol, Liposomal Glutathione, Peptide, and MADEWHITE (20,000ppm), composed of Madecassoside (Centella Asiatica Extracts).

[RECOMMENDED FOR] All skin types: oily, dry, combination, acne-prone, and sensitive skin. Especially recommended for the following skin concerns: hyperpigmentation, dark spots, acne scars and marks, dull and tired complexion.

Ingredients

fullName: Numbuzin 5+ Vitamin Concentrate Serum

descriptionRaw:
[DARK SPOTS SERUM] Daily serum enriched with tone-evening ingredients, glutathione and vitamin C, and antioxidants, to gently yet effectively fade dark spots and hyperpigmentation, leaving you with glowing, clear skin. [GLUTATHIONE] Glutathione is a well-known supplement especially in Korea, to improve dull, uneven skin tone and to fade hyperpigmentation, dark spots, and acne marks. This powerful antioxidant inhibits melanin overproduction and accumulation, which are the leading causes of hyperpigmentation. Glutathione-enriched skincare offers a gentler and more effective alternative to supplements. 

[KEY INGREDIENTS] Contains antioxidants and tone-evening ingredients glutathione, vitamin C, niacinamide and tranexamic acid to help gently yet effectively fade hyperpigmentation and darks spots and even out dull, uneven skin tone. Panthenol and ceramides for soothing and hydration. 
[CLINICALLY TESTED] Clinically proven to even out skin tone by 18.90% and reduce dark spots by 9.65% in 4 weeks. Hypoallergenic and skin irritation tests completed, making it safe to use for sensitive and acne-prone skin types. [RECOMMENDED FOR] All skin types: oily, dry, combination, acne-prone, and sensitive skin. Especially recommended for the following skin concerns: hyperpigmentation, dark spots, acne scars and marks, dull and tired complexion.

name: 9 NAD+ Full Face Mask
fullName: Numbuzin 9 NAD+ Full Face Mask
whyItFits: A mask that helps improve glow and tone, helps with visible pores, helps smooth uneven texture for oily skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
[FIRMING SHEET MASK] A firming sheet mask featuring a top and bottom section: the top mask contains NAD+ BIO capsules, while the bottom mask is infused with dissolvable PLA threads, that helps enhance defined jawline and gives radiant, plump skin. The additional lifting band further enhances the lifting effect by tightening and sculpting the face.

[KEY INGREDIENTS] Formulated with NAD+, an anti-aging ingredient that boosts cell turnover, stimulates collagen production, and supports skin repair, along with 50 types of peptides to plump and firm the skin. Hydrolyzed collagen and adenosine are also added to effectively target wrinkles and enhance skin elasticity.

[CLINICALLY TESTED] Clinically proven to improve 6 types of wrinkles (jawline, buccal fat, smile lines, neck, chin, cheek) in just 4 weeks. Reduces the appearance of enlarged pores and improves facial puffiness overnight after using the product for 8 hours.

[RECOMMENDED FOR] All skin types. Especially for wrinkles and fine lines, loose pores and sagging skin, loss of elasticity and firmness.

[HOW TO USE] 1. Start by unfolding the top mask and aligning the eye holes with your eyes. 2. Align the slit in the middle of the bottom mask with your chin, then lift both ends and hook them over your ears. Adjust the intensity of the lower mask by choosing between the two ear slits. 3. Gently smooth the mask down over the chin area 4. For enhanced lifting, position the lifting band under your chin, gently pull up both sides, and secure them by overlapping at the top of your head. 5. Leave the mask on for at least 20 minutes to optimize radiance and lifting effects.

name: FLASHPATCH® Illuminating EYE GELS - 5 Pack
fullName: Patchology FLASHPATCH® Illuminating EYE GELS - 5 Pack
whyItFits: A mask that supports hydration, helps improve glow and tone for dry skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
An occasional boost of radiance can help us all feel better. Under-eye gels containing Vitamin C provide the right pick-me-up, plus green tea extract to improve circulation and reduce the appearance of dark under-eyes, mulberry extract to brighten skin from within, and reflective pearlescent minerals for an immediate luminous glow.

Infused with the perfect balance of antioxidants and minerals, Illuminating helps to fight environmental hazards while keeping skin soft and vibrant. Rejuvenate your skin and maintain optimum hydration for a refreshed and more youthful look.

Green tea

Green tea is a rich source of antioxidants, which can help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. It also contains catechins, which have been shown to improve microcirculation and reduce inflammation.

Mulberry Extract

Mulberry extract is a traditional Chinese medicine ingredient that has been used for centuries to brighten the skin. It is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties.

Vitamin C

Vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant that can help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. It can also help to boost collagen production, which can help to reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines.
Ingredients
water (aqua/eau), glycerin, caffeine, butylene glycol, camellia sinensis leaf extract, ascorbic acid, glycyrrhiza uralensis (licorice) root extract, sodium hyaluronate, morus nigra fruit extract, cocos nucifera (coconut) fruit extract, cedrus atlantica bark extract, propanediol, pentylene glycol, pinus sylvestris leaf extract, ceratonia siliqua (carob) gum, sucrose, carrageenan, potassium chloride, peg-60 hydrogenated castor oil, xanthan gum, ethyl hexanediol, 1,2-hexanediol, allantoin, chlorphenesin, sodium polyacrylate, ricinus communis (castor) seed oil, gellan gum, cellulose gum, calcium lactate, adenosine, dipotassium glycyrrhizate, betaine, trehalose, inositol, taurine, mica, titanium dioxide, tin oxide, disodium edta, Ethylhexyl glycerin, sodium polyglutamate, acetyl glucosamine, ci 77491, fragrance (parfum)

  • Deep-sea water, sourced from the depths of 605 meters in Gangwon Province's East Sea, boasts exceptional purity and cleanliness. whyItFits: A essence that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin for dehydrated, dry, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
Elevate your child's skincare routine with the refreshing touch of nature through our Real Fruit Facial Mask Sheet - Aloe Refresh! Let them indulge in the soothing power of aloe vera, encapsulated in each mask. Custom-made for kids, this mask provides a replenishing experience that awakens and nurtures their tender skin. Discover the secret of premium Korean skincare with our meticulously crafted masks – a cherished gift for your beloved children.

The Pyunkang Yul Black Tea Revitalizing Mask Pack offers a luxurious skincare experience, blending the antioxidant power of fermented Black Tea (Kombucha) with peptides and low-molecular collagen for rejuvenation. This mask deeply nourishes, hydrates, and reduces wrinkles while improving skin elasticity and strengthening the moisture barrier for a firmer, youthful complexion. name: Yul Calming Mask - Single
fullName: Pyunkang Yul Calming Mask - Single
whyItFits: A cleanser that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin, supports the skin barrier for acne-prone, dry, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Use as an optional treatment step after cleansing/toner.
descriptionRaw:
The Pyunkang Yul Calming Mask Pack provides a soothing solution for dry and sensitive skin with its 100% bamboo-derived sheets and ceramide for stronger skin barriers. It delivers rich moisture deep into the skin and is certified as zero-irritation, vegan, and EWG graded safe. Recommended for acne-prone and troubled skin, this mask works best with key ingredient, Centella Asiatica extract, known for its soothing properties that calm irritated skin. The mask pack has a mild, low pH formulation similar to healthy skin. To use, apply toner after cleansing, place the mask for 10 to 20 minutes, remove it, and pat the remaining essence for absorption. name: Yul Mist Toner - 200ml
fullName: Pyunkang Yul Mist Toner - 200ml
whyItFits: A toner that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin for dry, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.

The Pyunkang Yul Mist Toner is a refreshing, multi-functional toner that provides instant hydration and skin-soothing benefits. This ultra-lightweight mist is formulated with Coptis Japonica Root Extract to calm and balance the skin, while Hyaluronic Acid works to deeply hydrate and lock in moisture. Ideal for all skin types, including sensitive skin, this mist toner can be used throughout the day to revitalize skin, set makeup, or as a soothing pick-me-up for dry, irritated skin. Its fine, ultra-fine mist delivers a cooling sensation and effortlessly absorbs, leaving skin feeling refreshed, soft, and balanced without any sticky residue.

Coptis Chinensis Root Extract, 1,2-Hexanediol, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate

whyItFits: A eye-cream that supports hydration, helps improve glow and tone, helps smooth uneven texture for dry skin.
layeringNotes: Use at night after toner; buffer with moisturizer if sensitive.
descriptionRaw:
Brighten and hydrate your eyes with the Collagen Brightening Eye Gel Cream. This lightweight, vegan formula features 81% lavender flower water, plant-derived collagen, and D-Panthenol to smooth fine lines, boost elasticity, and lock in moisture. Its refreshing gel texture absorbs quickly, leaving your eye area firm, plump, and radiant.
Ingredients
Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Water, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, 1,2-Hexanediol, Niacinamide, Water, Glycereth-26, Propanediol, Carbomer, Sodium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, Tromethamine, Glycereth-25 PCA Isostearate, Panthenol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Adenosine, Zea Mays (Corn) Kernel Extract, Hydrolyzed Gardenia Florida Extract, Hydrolyzed Malt Extract, Disodium EDTA, Hydrolyzed Viola Tricolor Extract, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Melia Azadirachta Flower Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, Ammonium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Collagen(45ppm), Coccinia Indica Fruit Extract, Betaine, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Fructan, Solanum Melongena (Eggplant) Fruit Extract, Corallina Officinalis Extract, Glucose, Ocimum Sanctum Leaf Extract, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Quartz, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Retinol, Brassica Campestris (Rapeseed) Sterols, Cholesterol, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Phytosteryl/Behenyl/Octyldodecyl Lauroyl Glutamate, Aluminum/Magnesium Hydroxide Stearate, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-di-t-butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Potassium Cetyl Phosphate, Chitosan, Tris(Tetramethylhydroxypiperidinol) Citrate, Linalool

name: Cotton Soft Sun Stick SPF 50+ PA++++
fullName: Tocobo Cotton Soft Sun Stick SPF 50+ PA++++
whyItFits: A sunscreen that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin for dry, oily skin.
layeringNotes: Last step in AM routine; reapply every 2 hours.
descriptionRaw:
This chemical and mineral hybrid sunscreen stick offers SPF 50+ PA++++ UV protection. It moisturizes skin with natural ingredients like evening primrose flower extract and jojoba seed oil. Sun stick calms skin and controls excess sebum with AC Herb Complex. Formula contains micro-sized powder to leave a soft matte finish. Apply the portable sun stick onto the face and body areas 30 minutes before exposure to the sun. The product is cruelty-free and vegan.
Ingredients
Synthetic Wax, Dibutyl Adipate, Butylene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, Octocrylene, Methyl Methacrylate Crosspolymer, Vinyl Dimethicone/Methicone Silsesquioxane Crosspolymer, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Cetyl Ethylhexanoate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Silica, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Tocopherylacetate, Ozoke-rite, Caprylyl Glycol, Bisabolol, Polyglyceryl-2 Triisostearate, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Titanium Dioxide, Octyldodecanol, Parfum, Polyglyceryl-4 Diisostearate/Polyhydroxystearate/Sebacate, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Melia Azadirachta Flower Extract, Echium Plantagineum Seed Oil, Coccinia Indica Fruit Extract, Aloe Barbadensis Flower Extract, Solanum Melongena Fruit Extract, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Cardiospermum Halicacabum Flower/Leaf/Vine Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil Unsaponifiables, Corallina Officinalis Extract, Curcuma Longa Root Extract, Ocimum Sanctum Leaf Extract, Tocopherol, Water, Butylene Glycol, 1,2 Hexanediol, Gossypium Herbaceum Extract, Phellodendron Amurense Bark Extract, Rheum Palmatum Root/Stalk Extract, Scutellaria Baicalensis Root Extract, Sophora Flavescens Root Extract, Oenothera Biennis Flower Extract, Pinus Palustris Leaf Extract, Pueraria Lobata Root Extract, Ulmus Davidiana Root Extract

name: Juicy Berry Lip Plumping Oil
fullName: Tocobo Juicy Berry Lip Plumping Oil
whyItFits: A product that supports hydration, helps improve glow and tone for dry skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.
descriptionRaw:
Refresh and dazzle with the Sparkling Juicy Lip Oil. Inspired by sweet, colorful drinks, it delivers a radiant, non-sticky shine while keeping lips hydrated and plump. Perfect for a vibrant, luminous look every day!

name: Lip Mask
fullName: Tocobo Lip Mask
whyItFits: A mask that supports hydration, helps smooth uneven texture for dehydrated, dry, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.
descriptionRaw:
Collagen Boosting Lip Mask
Functional overnight lip mask with collagen to care for elastic lips, and the balm formula with olive and lavender oils hydrates and smooths dry, wrinkled lips, providing wrinkle improvement. 

Vita Glazed Lip Mask
Extremely Hydrating Overnight Lip Care, Hypoallergenic Lip care with Vegan Natural-derived Ingredients for Lips. Wraps dry lips like a glaze with a powerful oil moisturizing film to care for dead skin cells. Nourish and moisturize for moist and smooth lip care.

name: Advanced Formula Pure Hydration Cream
fullName: Yu-Be Advanced Formula Pure Hydration Cream
whyItFits: A moisturizer that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin for dehydrated, dry, sensitive skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.
descriptionRaw:
If your skin reacts to fragrance or harsh ingredients, Yu-Be’s Advanced Formula Pure Hydration Cream with Chamomile Extract is made just for you. This 100% vegan, ultra-gentle moisturizer delivers deep hydration without irritation—perfect for extra-sensitive skin.

Why Sensitive Skin Loves It:
✔ Fragrance-free & extra gentle – As rich and nourishing as our best-selling original, but without scent
✔ Deep hydration & instant relief – High glycerin content restores even the driest, most delicate skin
✔ Chamomile extract – Soothes irritation, boosts cell renewal, and smooths fine lines
✔ Vitamin E & B6 power duo –
• Vitamin E calms, moisturizes, and supports skin recovery
• Vitamin B6 fights free radicals to keep skin firm, clear & youthful
✔ Non-greasy, fast-absorbing formula – Hydrates deeply without feeling heavy
✔ Pure & safe – No artificial colors, fragrances, parabens, or alcohol
✔ Made in Japan – Crafted with expert skincare science for sensitive skin

Hydration that’s as gentle as it is effective—because sensitive skin deserves the best.
Ingredients
Glycerin , Water, Isopropyl Myristate, Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Triethanolamine, Stearyl Alcohol, Hydrogenated coco-glycerides, Polysorbate 80, Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E), Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Pyridoxine HCL (Vitamin B6), Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract.

name: Original Formula Moisturizing Skin Cream
fullName: Yu-Be Original Formula Moisturizing Skin Cream
whyItFits: A moisturizer that supports hydration, helps calm stressed skin, helps improve glow and tone for dehydrated, dry, oily skin.
layeringNotes: Apply after toner and before moisturizer.
descriptionRaw:
Whether you’re dealing with eczema, sunburn, or severely dry skin, or just want a moisturizer that deeply nourishes and restores, this powerful, multi-functional skin cream has you covered.

Why It’s a Skincare Must-Have:
✔ Relieves inflammation & itch – Camphor instantly soothes irritated skin (great for eczema, bug bites & burns!)
✔ Deep hydration, even in extreme conditions – Trusted on Mt. Everest to fight dryness in sub-zero temps
✔ Repairs & restores – Vitamin C boosts collagen, Vitamin E helps heal, and Vitamin B2 brightens uneven skin
✔ Non-greasy, fast-absorbing – Hydrates without clogging pores or feeling heavy
✔ 100% Vegan, alcohol-free, and paraben-free
✔ Made in Japan & travel-friendly – Take it anywhere for on-the-go relief

Powerful. Proven. Your skin’s new best friend.
